# signOut

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for signOut

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSignOutMutation(); mutate({ input: '<SignOutInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useSignOutMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSignOutMutation();
mutate({ input: '<SignOutInput>' });
```
